zh.lifeSummary: 當Mrs. Sybilla Scures於1350年出生在英國哈普爾法雷哈姆時，她的父親Sir John Wickham De Scures25歲，母親Lady Margareth De Scures21歲。她和John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament"至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mrs. Sybilla Scures于1350年出生在英国哈普爾法雷哈姆时，她的父亲Sir John Wickham De Scures25岁，母亲Lady Margareth De Scures21岁。她和John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament"至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Sybilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Mrs. Sybilla Scures was born in 1350, in Fareham, Hampshire, England, her father, Sir John Wickham De Scures, was 25 and her mother, Lady Margareth De Scures, was 21. She had at least 1 son with John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament".

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mrs. Sybilla Scures est née en 1350, à Fareham, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Wickham De Scures, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Margareth De Scures, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament".

de.lifeSummary: Als Mrs. Sybilla Scures 1350 in Fareham, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Wickham De Scures 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Margareth De Scures 21. Sie hatte mit John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament" mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mrs. Sybilla Scures è nata il nel 1350 nel Fareham, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Wickham De Scures, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Margareth De Scures, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament".

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Sybilla Scuresが1350年にイギリスハンプシュアイアファレハムで生まれた時，父Sir John Wickham De Scuresは25歳，母Lady Margareth De Scuresは21歳であった。彼女はJohn UVEDALE "Member of Parliament"との間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Sybilla Scures(이)가 1350년 영국 함프실르 패레함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Wickham De Scures(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margareth De Scures(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament"(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mrs. Sybilla Scures nasceu em 1350, em Fareham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Wickham De Scures, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margareth De Scures, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament".

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mrs. Sybilla Scures родилась в 1350 г. в местности фарэам, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Wickham De Scures было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margareth De Scures, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament".

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mrs. Sybilla Scures nació en 1350, en Fareham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Wickham De Scures, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Margareth De Scures, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con John UVEDALE "Member of Parliament".
